segments.text: Boober trying for the edge trap but didn't connect—actually good! Fair-nair is coming up!
segments.original_text: ブーバーブー落とし目で繋がらなかった本当に良かった 空前Nを上げている

segments.text: Keep mixing up your approaches—wow, that's skillful!
segments.original_text: いろいろサイクチェンジしろー見事はお見事で

full_text: Boober trying for the edge trap but didn't connect—actually good! Fair-nair is coming up! Keep mixing up your approaches—wow, that's skillful!

corrections.original: サイクチェンシロー見事
corrections.corrected: サイクチェンジしろー見事
